contentPattern.structure: heading + intro + bulleted list (left) | responsive icon graphic (right)

suitableFor: two-column info section with a bulleted list beside a supporting icon
text-heavy explainer with magenta dot markers and a right-aligned graphic
sections needing a desktop/tablet responsive icon swap (two authored images)
notSuitableFor: dark-background CTA sections (use the columns-content dark variant)
cost/price sections needing the 81/19 grid (use columns-content icon-right without dot-list)
